leadership.founders_experience: The founding team includes PhDs in computer vision and AI from top universities, with prior experience at Google, NVIDIA, and startups in video analytics and deep learning. The CEO has a background in scaling AI startups and enterprise software delivery.

product_maturity.deployment_scale: Deployed in pilot and production environments across retail, security, and manufacturing sectors. Supports real-time video processing at scale with cloud and edge deployment options.

primary_use_cases: Automated retail analytics (foot traffic, customer behavior)
Smart city surveillance and traffic management
Manufacturing quality control and defect detection
Security and threat detection in real-time

delivery_feasibility.notes: Solution requires integration with existing video infrastructure and may need customization for industry-specific use cases. Documentation and support appear robust based on public resources.

commercial_viability.notes: Company demonstrates openness to partnerships and has a scalable SaaS model. Pricing is not publicly disclosed, suggesting a custom enterprise sales motion.
